subcodes.first_line: O my Lord, Thou Who didst manifest Thyself upon Sinai and art the Lord of Resurrection Day, Light of the heavens, Quickener of all created things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا ربی المجلی علی الطور و مالک یوم النشور نور السموات باعث الکائنات
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @spiritual transformation, @unity; oneness of humanity
